step.name: event-storming
step.action: Run event-storming session; map business events; cluster into bounded contexts. Identify aggregates per context.
step.output: Bounded context list + aggregates per context.

step.name: assign-data
step.action: For each context, list owned tables. Identify cross-context joins; flag for migration to events/CDC.
step.decision-gate: If any table has >1 owner, STOP and split.

step.name: assign-team
step.action: Assign exactly one team per service. If team boundary doesn't match, redraw OR merge services.

step.name: publish-contracts
step.action: Define OpenAPI/protobuf/Avro per service. Register in schema registry. Wire CI compatibility check.

step.name: document-and-review
step.action: Write ADR per service: bounded context, owned data, contract URL, owner team. Review with all affected teams.
step.decision-gate: If any service has shared DB or cross-service joins, STOP and refactor.
